name: RPlog_Hey_Mister_Tally-Man_tally_me_stolen_cargo
title: A Pirate's Delivery at the Plaxton Embassy
summary: On the landing pad of the New Republic embassy in Plaxton City on Caspar, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard welcomes the pirate Captain Shiari Vane, who has delivered a stolen Imperial Action VI freighter, the Corulag Haul, along with its cargo and ten captured Imperial Navy crewmen. The two women negotiate Vane's payment in good humor, settling on sixteen thousand three hundred credits plus cargo, with ten percent of the ship's black-market value as the standard cut. Tension flares briefly when Vane refuses to surrender her sidearms to enter the embassy proper, prompting Ambrosia to confine the dealings to the landing pad rather than break security protocol. Vane agrees to wait for the cargo tally and her payment, and Ambrosia notes the difficulty of the pirate's departure given the Imperial blockade, offering NR fleet assistance. The encounter ends cordially, with Ambrosia welcoming Vane to Caspar and dangling the prospect of future smuggling business.
